meaning: adj.(食物)耐嚼的,不易嚼碎的
examples: Only then will it be possible to eat chewy white turkey.
My starving soul nearly screamed with each voluptuous bite of silky roasted vegetables and chewy crust.
The irony is that shark fin is flavorless -- its cartilage has a chewy consistency.
But, on one recent evening, the culotte steak of wagyu, a famously butter-soft beef, arrived chewy.
